name: research-verification
description: Verify research claims, fact-check citations, audit evidence integrity, and catch fabricated references. Implements the VERIFY framework with live DOI resolution (CrossRef primary, OpenAlex fallback), metadata cross-check (title >=0.85 fuzzy, first-author surname, year +/-1), a no-DOI candidate-scoring path, and a structured per-reference verdict envelope. Ships with a worked example and a 30-reference acceptance corpus.
